option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.CheckBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Hyperlink?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.PasswordField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Separator?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<AnchorPane prefHeight="700.0" prefWidth="1000.0" style="-fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="org.example.client.controllers.LoginController"> <children> <VBox layoutX="0.0" layoutY="0.0" prefHeight="700.0" prefWidth="400.0" spacing="30.0" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-padding: 40;"> <Label text="" textFill="white"> <font> <Font size="60.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="AUCTION SYSTEM" textFill="white"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="36.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Hệ Thống Đấu Giá Trực Tuyến" textFill="#ffffff" wrapText="true"> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Mua bán và đấu giá những vật phẩm quý giá một cách công khai và minh bạch" textFill="#e0e0e0" wrapText="true" style="-fx-line-spacing: 5;"> <font> <Font size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox>
<VBox layoutX="450.0" layoutY="60.0" prefHeight="580.0" prefWidth="480.0" spacing="0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 15; -fx-effect: dropshadow(gaussian, rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 15, 0, 0, 5);">
<VBox prefHeight="80.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 30; -fx-border-color: #f0f0f0; -fx-border-width: 0 0 1 0;"> <Label text="Đăng Nhập" textFill="#667eea"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="24.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Vui lòng nhập thông tin để tiếp tục" textFill="#999999"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox>
<VBox prefHeight="380.0" spacing="18.0" style="-fx-padding: 30;">
<VBox spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Tên Đăng Nhập" textFill="#333333"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <TextField fx:id="usernameField" prefHeight="45.0" style="-fx-padding: 12; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-background-radius: 5;" promptText="Nhập tên đăng nhập hoặc email" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Mật Khẩu" textFill="#333333"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <PasswordField fx:id="passwordField" prefHeight="45.0" style="-fx-padding: 12; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-background-radius: 5;" promptText="Nhập mật khẩu" /> </VBox>
<HBox prefHeight="20.0" spacing="0"> <CheckBox fx:id="rememberCheckbox" text="Nhớ mật khẩu" textFill="#666666"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </CheckBox> <Region prefHeight="20.0" prefWidth="150.0" /> <Hyperlink text="Quên mật khẩu?" onAction="#onForgotPasswordClicked" style="-fx-text-fill: #667eea; -fx-font-size: 12;" underline="false" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="errorLabel" prefHeight="25.0" textFill="#d32f2f" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;" />
<Button onAction="#onLoginButtonClicked" prefHeight="50.0" prefWidth="420.0" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-padding: 0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="ĐĂNG NHẬP" />
<HBox prefHeight="15.0" spacing="10.0" alignment="CENTER"> <Separator prefWidth="160.0" /> <Label text="Hoặc" textFill="#999999"> <font> <Font size="11.0" /> </font> </Label> <Separator prefWidth="160.0" /> </HBox>
<HBox prefHeight="40.0" spacing="0" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="Bạn chưa có tài khoản? " textFill="#666666"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <Hyperlink text="Đăng ký ngay" onAction="#onSignUpButtonClicked" style="-fx-text-fill: #667eea; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12; -fx-padding: 0;" underline="false" /> </HBox> </VBox>
<VBox prefHeight="60.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 20; -fx-border-color: #f0f0f0; -fx-border-width: 1 0 0 0; -fx-alignment: center;"> <Label text="© 2024 Auction System. All rights reserved." textFill="#cccccc"> <font> <Font size="10.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox> </VBox> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.CheckBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Hyperlink?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.PasswordField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Separator?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<AnchorPane prefHeight="700.0" prefWidth="1000.0" style="-fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="org.example.client.controllers.LoginController"> <children> <VBox layoutX="0.0" layoutY="0.0" prefHeight="700.0" prefWidth="400.0" spacing="30.0" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-padding: 40;"> <Label text="" textFill="white"> <font> <Font size="60.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="AUCTION SYSTEM" textFill="white"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="36.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Hệ Thống Đấu Giá Trực Tuyến" textFill="#ffffff" wrapText="true"> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Mua bán và đấu giá những vật phẩm quý giá một cách công khai và minh bạch" textFill="#e0e0e0" wrapText="true" style="-fx-line-spacing: 5;"> <font> <Font size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox>
<VBox layoutX="450.0" layoutY="60.0" prefHeight="580.0" prefWidth="480.0" spacing="0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 15; -fx-effect: dropshadow(gaussian, rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 15, 0, 0, 5);">
<VBox prefHeight="80.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 30; -fx-border-color: #f0f0f0; -fx-border-width: 0 0 1 0;"> <Label text="Đăng Nhập" textFill="#667eea"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="24.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Vui lòng nhập thông tin để tiếp tục" textFill="#999999"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox>
<VBox prefHeight="380.0" spacing="18.0" style="-fx-padding: 30;">
<VBox spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Tên Đăng Nhập" textFill="#333333"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <TextField fx:id="usernameField" prefHeight="45.0" style="-fx-padding: 12; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-background-radius: 5;" promptText="Nhập tên đăng nhập hoặc email" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Mật Khẩu" textFill="#333333"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <PasswordField fx:id="passwordField" prefHeight="45.0" style="-fx-padding: 12; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-background-radius: 5;" promptText="Nhập mật khẩu" /> </VBox>
<HBox prefHeight="20.0" spacing="0"> <CheckBox fx:id="rememberCheckbox" text="Nhớ mật khẩu" textFill="#666666"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </CheckBox> <Region prefHeight="20.0" prefWidth="150.0" /> <Hyperlink text="Quên mật khẩu?" onAction="#onForgotPasswordClicked" style="-fx-text-fill: #667eea; -fx-font-size: 12;" underline="false" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="errorLabel" prefHeight="25.0" textFill="#d32f2f" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;" />
<Button onAction="#onLoginButtonClicked" prefHeight="50.0" prefWidth="420.0" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-padding: 0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="ĐĂNG NHẬP" />
<HBox prefHeight="15.0" spacing="10.0" alignment="CENTER"> <Separator prefWidth="160.0" /> <Label text="Hoặc" textFill="#999999"> <font> <Font size="11.0" /> </font> </Label> <Separator prefWidth="160.0" /> </HBox>
<HBox prefHeight="40.0" spacing="0" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="Bạn chưa có tài khoản? " textFill="#666666"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <Hyperlink text="Đăng ký ngay" onAction="#onSignUpButtonClicked" style="-fx-text-fill: #667eea; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12; -fx-padding: 0;" underline="false" /> </HBox> </VBox>
<VBox prefHeight="60.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 20; -fx-border-color: #f0f0f0; -fx-border-width: 1 0 0 0; -fx-alignment: center;"> <Label text="© 2024 Auction System. All rights reserved." textFill="#cccccc"> <font> <Font size="10.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox> </VBox> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Hyperlink?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.PasswordField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Separator?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<AnchorPane prefHeight="700.0" prefWidth="1000.0" style="-fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="org.example.client.controllers.SignUpController"> <children> <VBox layoutX="0.0" layoutY="0.0" prefHeight="700.0" prefWidth="400.0" spacing="30.0" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-padding: 40;"> <Label text="" textFill="white"> <font> <Font size="60.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="AUCTION SYSTEM" textFill="white"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="36.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Hệ Thống Đấu Giá Trực Tuyến" textFill="#ffffff" wrapText="true"> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Đăng ký tài khoản để tham gia đấu giá" textFill="#e0e0e0" wrapText="true" style="-fx-line-spacing: 5;"> <font> <Font size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox>
<VBox layoutX="450.0" layoutY="60.0" prefHeight="580.0" prefWidth="480.0" spacing="0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 15; -fx-effect: dropshadow(gaussian, rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 15, 0, 0, 5);">
<VBox prefHeight="80.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 30; -fx-border-color: #f0f0f0; -fx-border-width: 0 0 1 0;"> <Label text="Đăng Ký" textFill="#667eea"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="24.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Tạo tài khoản mới để bắt đầu" textFill="#999999"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox>
<VBox prefHeight="380.0" spacing="18.0" style="-fx-padding: 30;">
<VBox spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Tên Đăng Nhập" textFill="#333333"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <TextField fx:id="usernameField" prefHeight="45.0" style="-fx-padding: 12; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-background-radius: 5;" promptText="Nhập tên đăng nhập hoặc email" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0"> <Label text=" Mật Khẩu" textFill="#333333"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <PasswordField fx:id="passwordField" prefHeight="45.0" style="-fx-padding: 12; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-background-radius: 5;" promptText="Nhập mật khẩu" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0"> <Label text=" Xác Nhận Mật Khẩu" textFill="#333333"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <PasswordField fx:id="confirmPasswordField" prefHeight="45.0" style="-fx-padding: 12; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-background-radius: 5;" promptText="Nhập lại mật khẩu" /> </VBox>
<Label fx:id="errorLabel" prefHeight="25.0" textFill="#d32f2f" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;" />
<Button onAction="#onSignUpButtonClicked" prefHeight="50.0" prefWidth="420.0" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-background-color: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-padding: 0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="ĐĂNG KÝ" />
<HBox prefHeight="15.0" spacing="10.0" alignment="CENTER"> <Separator prefWidth="160.0" /> <Label text="Hoặc" textFill="#999999"> <font> <Font size="11.0" /> </font> </Label> <Separator prefWidth="160.0" /> </HBox>
<HBox prefHeight="40.0" spacing="0" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="Đã có tài khoản? " textFill="#666666"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <Hyperlink text="Đăng nhập" onAction="#onBackToLoginClicked" style="-fx-text-fill: #667eea; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12; -fx-padding: 0;" underline="false" /> </HBox> </VBox>
<VBox prefHeight="60.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 20; -fx-border-color: #f0f0f0; -fx-border-width: 1 0 0 0; -fx-alignment: center;"> <Label text="© 2024 Auction System. All rights reserved." textFill="#cccccc"> <font> <Font size="10.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox> </VBox> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Hyperlink?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.PasswordField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Separator?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<AnchorPane prefHeight="700.0" prefWidth="1000.0" style="-fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="org.example.client.controllers.SignUpController"> <children> <VBox layoutX="0.0" layoutY="0.0" prefHeight="700.0" prefWidth="400.0" spacing="30.0" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-padding: 40;"> <Label text="" textFill="white"> <font> <Font size="60.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="AUCTION SYSTEM" textFill="white"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="36.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Hệ Thống Đấu Giá Trực Tuyến" textFill="#ffffff" wrapText="true"> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Đăng ký tài khoản để tham gia đấu giá" textFill="#e0e0e0" wrapText="true" style="-fx-line-spacing: 5;"> <font> <Font size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox>
<VBox layoutX="450.0" layoutY="60.0" prefHeight="580.0" prefWidth="480.0" spacing="0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 15; -fx-effect: dropshadow(gaussian, rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 15, 0, 0, 5);">
<VBox prefHeight="80.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 30; -fx-border-color: #f0f0f0; -fx-border-width: 0 0 1 0;"> <Label text="Đăng Ký" textFill="#667eea"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="24.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label text="Tạo tài khoản mới để bắt đầu" textFill="#999999"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox>
<VBox prefHeight="380.0" spacing="18.0" style="-fx-padding: 30;">
<VBox spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Tên Đăng Nhập" textFill="#333333"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <TextField fx:id="usernameField" prefHeight="45.0" style="-fx-padding: 12; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-background-radius: 5;" promptText="Nhập tên đăng nhập hoặc email" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Mật Khẩu" textFill="#333333"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <PasswordField fx:id="passwordField" prefHeight="45.0" style="-fx-padding: 12; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-background-radius: 5;" promptText="Nhập mật khẩu" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0"> <Label text=" Xác Nhận Mật Khẩu" textFill="#333333"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <PasswordField fx:id="confirmPasswordField" prefHeight="45.0" style="-fx-padding: 12; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-background-radius: 5;" promptText="Nhập lại mật khẩu" /> </VBox>
<Label fx:id="errorLabel" prefHeight="25.0" textFill="#d32f2f" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;" />
<Button onAction="#onSignUpButtonClicked" prefHeight="50.0" prefWidth="420.0" style="-fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-background-color: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-padding: 0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="ĐĂNG KÝ" />
<HBox prefHeight="15.0" spacing="10.0" alignment="CENTER"> <Separator prefWidth="160.0" /> <Label text="Hoặc" textFill="#999999"> <font> <Font size="11.0" /> </font> </Label> <Separator prefWidth="160.0" /> </HBox>
<HBox prefHeight="40.0" spacing="0" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="Đã có tài khoản? " textFill="#666666"> <font> <Font size="12.0" /> </font> </Label> <Hyperlink text="Đăng nhập" onAction="#onBackToLoginClicked" style="-fx-text-fill: #667eea; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12; -fx-padding: 0;" underline="false" /> </HBox> </VBox>
<VBox prefHeight="60.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 20; -fx-border-color: #f0f0f0; -fx-border-width: 1 0 0 0; -fx-alignment: center;"> <Label text="© 2024 Auction System. All rights reserved." textFill="#cccccc"> <font> <Font size="10.0" /> </font> </Label> </VBox> </VBox> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
